---
title: "Systematic Review Bot"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header: _popover.html
---

## Source Files

::: {.file-list}

::: {.file-card}
::: {.file-info}
::: {.file-icon}
.MD
:::
<div>
<div class="file-name">000_systematic_review_bot_system_instructions.md</div>
<div class="file-desc">System instructions to build a systematic review bot</div>
</div>
:::
<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover('bot/000_systematic_review_bot_system_instructions.md')">⊞ Preview</button>
:::

::: {.file-card}
::: {.file-info}
::: {.file-icon}
.MD
:::
<div>
<div class="file-name">KB1_information_gathering.md</div>
<div class="file-desc">KB1: Collect desired search criteria</div>
</div>
:::
<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover('bot/KB1_information_gathering.md')">⊞ Preview</button>
:::

::: {.file-card}
::: {.file-info}
::: {.file-icon}
.MD
:::
<div>
<div class="file-name">KB2_search_strategy_and_sources.md</div>
<div class="file-desc">KB2: Search strategies & available resources/tools</div>
</div>
:::
<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover('bot/KB2_search_strategy_and_sources.md')">⊞ Preview</button>
:::

::: {.file-card}
::: {.file-info}
::: {.file-icon}
.MD
:::
<div>
<div class="file-name">KB3_study_selection.md</div>
<div class="file-desc">KB3: Selection criteria</div>
</div>
:::
<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover('bot/KB3_study_selection.md')">⊞ Preview</button>
:::

::: {.file-card}
::: {.file-info}
::: {.file-icon}
.MD
:::
<div>
<div class="file-name">KB4_data_extraction.md</div>
<div class="file-desc">KB4: Extraction and table assembly</div>
</div>
:::
<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover('bot/KB4_data_extraction.md')">⊞ Preview</button>
:::

::: {.file-card}
::: {.file-info}
::: {.file-icon}
.MD
:::
<div>
<div class="file-name">KB5_data_synthesis_and_reporting.md</div>
<div class="file-desc">KB5: Narrative synthesis</div>
</div>
:::
<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover('bot/KB5_data_synthesis_and_reporting.md')">⊞ Preview</button>
:::

::: {.file-card}
::: {.file-info}
::: {.file-icon}
.MD
:::
<div>
<div class="file-name">KB6_writing_style_requirements.md</div>
<div class="file-desc">KB6: Prompt for writing style</div>
</div>
:::
<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover('bot/KB6_writing_style_requirements.md')">⊞ Preview</button>
:::

::: {.file-card}
::: {.file-info}
::: {.file-icon}
.MD
:::
<div>
<div class="file-name">KB7_citations_and_reference_style.md</div>
<div class="file-desc">KB7: Assemble bibliography</div>
</div>
:::
<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover('bot/KB7_citations_and_reference_style.md')">⊞ Preview</button>
:::

::: {.file-card}
::: {.file-info}
::: {.file-icon}
.MD
:::
<div>
<div class="file-name">KB8_pubmed_queries.md</div>
<div class="file-desc">KB8: PubMed search strategy</div>
</div>
:::
<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover('bot/KB8_pubmed_queries.md')">⊞ Preview</button>
:::

::: {.file-card}
::: {.file-info}
::: {.file-icon}
.MD
:::
<div>
<div class="file-name">KB9_openalex_queries.md</div>
<div class="file-desc">System instructions for conducting OpenAlex searches</div>
</div>
:::
<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover('bot/KB9_openalex_queries.md')">⊞ Preview</button>
:::

::: {.file-card}
::: {.file-info}
::: {.file-icon}
.MD
:::
<div>
<div class="file-name">prisma.md</div>
<div class="file-desc">PRISMA Systematic Reviews Checklist</div>
</div>
:::
<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover('bot/prisma.md')">⊞ Preview</button>
:::

::: {.file-card}
::: {.file-info}
::: {.file-icon}
.MD
:::
<div>
<div class="file-name">pubmed_openapi_annotated.md</div>
<div class="file-desc">Annotated YAML to access PubMed API using OpenAPI</div>
</div>
:::
<button class="btn-preview" onclick="openMdPopover('bot/pubmed_openapi_annotated.md')">⊞ Preview</button>
:::

:::
